title: (BUG) tui/event.rs: own_profile HashMap grows unbounded via /set command
description: The /set <k> <v> slash command in tui/src/event.rs calls state.own_profile.insert(key, value) with no limit on the number of entries, key length, or value length. A user (or a compromised terminal macro) can inflate own_profile arbitrarily. Similarly, the /alias command inserts into state.local_names with no cap. Fix: enforce a maximum number of keys (e.g. 100) and maximum key/value byte length (e.g. 256 bytes each) with a user-facing error on violation.
